title: Specs
noWorkspace: Select a workspace to see its specs.
empty: No specs yet. Create a story bound to a project and Steve PM will draft one.
qaReviewTooltip: Ask Jeff QA to evaluate the spec and tests, and auto-approve if complete.
qaRejectedFallback: The spec needs more work before it can be approved.
qaMissingTitle: No QA agent in this workspace
qaMissingBody: Add Jeff QA (or another agent with the qa-agent template) to enable auto-approval.
